authentication.instruction: Use a user-provided API key as a Bearer token. Do not guess or fabricate credentials.

defaultWorkflow: Call GET /api/v1/token to inspect the token.
Call GET /api/v1/sites to list accessible sites.
Use overview, timeseries, and breakdowns for most analysis tasks.
Use explore for multi-dimensional or complex filtering.
Use batch to reduce round trips when multiple GET requests are needed.

timeRanges.default: If from, to, and preset are omitted, analytics endpoints default to the last 7 days ending at request time. The default timeZone is UTC.

agentGuidance.filters: Use filter[field]=value for simple equality filters. Call analyticsSchema to discover supported fields.

taskRecipes.description: Summarize traffic for a site over a time range.
Find likely causes of a traffic drop.
Analyze Core Web Vitals and identify weak pages or regions.
Analyze custom events and event payload fields.

errorHandling.400: Check request parameters or JSON body against the OpenAPI schema.
errorHandling.401: Ask the user to provide a valid API key.
errorHandling.403: Explain that the API key lacks the required scope.
errorHandling.404: Treat inaccessible sites as not found.
errorHandling.409: Explain the conflict and ask the user for a different value.
errorHandling.413: Reduce the request body size or number of batched items.
errorHandling.500: Retry later or report that the service returned an internal error.
